scripts.validate: npm run sync && npx --yes hyperframes@0.7.17 lint && npx --yes hyperframes@0.7.17 validate --timeout 20000 && npx --yes hyperframes@0.7.17 inspect --timeout 20000

scripts.preview: npm run sync && npx --yes hyperframes@0.7.17 preview
